title: Module 1
content:
Principles of TQM
Definition of Quality, Dimensions of Quality, Quality Planning, Basic
concepts of Total Quality Management.
Leadership
Concepts, Role of Senior Management, Quality Council, Strategic
Planning, Barriers to TQM Implementation.
Employee
Involvement
Motivation, Empowerment, Teams, Recognition and Reward, Performance
Appraisal, Benefits.
Quality planning
SWOT analysis

title: Module 2
content:
Service Quality
Customer
Perception
of
Quality, Service Quality, Customer
satisfaction, Customer complaints, Customer Retention.
Reliability
Definition of reliability– key elements; failure analysis–failure density–
failure rate– probability of failure-
Bath tub curve. Mean time to failure (MTTF).
Quality Tools
The seven tools of quality, Statistical Fundamentals–Measures of central
tendency and dispersion, Population and Sample, Normal Curve.

title: Module 3
content:
Continuous Process Improvement
Juran Trilogy, PDSA Cycle, 5S,  Kaizen.
Supplier Partnership
Partnering,
sourcing, Supplier Selection, Supplier Rating, Relationship
Development.
Benchmarking
Reasons to Benchmarking, Benchmarking Process.
QFD
Quality Function Deployment (QFD), QFD Process, Benefits.

title: Module 4
content:
TPM and FMEA
Total Productive Maintenance (TPM) – Concept. Stages of FMEA – Concept
.
ISO
Need for ISO 9000 and Other Quality Systems, ISO  9000:2000, Quality
System– Elements, Implementation of
Quality System.
Quality Auditing
Documentation,
ISO
14000 –Concept,
Requirements
and
Benefits.
